zh.lifeSummary: Alain fitz Flaald Seneschal of Dol是Flaald fitz Hato First Steward of Dol的兒子，於大約1024年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉多爾-德-布利塔尼。他於1046年之前與Tittensor ingen kenneth在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他於1070年登記服兵役。他去世於1093年在他的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在巴基斯坦آزاد جموں و کشمیر布利a爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alain fitz Flaald Seneschal of Dol是Flaald fitz Hato First Steward of Dol的儿子，于大约1024年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉多爾-德-布利塔尼。他于1046年之前与Tittensor ingen kenneth在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他于1070年登记服兵役。他去世于1093年在他的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在巴基斯坦آزاد جموں و کشمیر布利a爾。

nameMeanings.name: fitz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
Altered form of English   Fitch  .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

variants.name: Fitzgerald
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Fitzwater
meanings: Irish: altered form of Fitzwalter, a patronymic from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Walter , meaning ‘son of Walter’.

History: This is the name of a family of Norman origin, descended from Godfrey, Count of Brionne (died c. 1010). Godfrey's grandson, Richard FitzGilbert, accompanied William the Conqueror and was made Lord of Clare. His great-grandson was Robert FitzWalter, one of the barons who guaranteed the Magna Carta in 1215.

variants.name: Fitzherbert
meanings: English and Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Herbert (see Herbert ), ‘son of Herbert’.

variants.name: Fitzhenry
meanings: Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Henry (see Henry ), ‘son of Henry’. This surname is common in Ireland (mainly Connacht), where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Éinrí. In at least some cases, it seems to have been adopted as a surname indicating the illegitimate offspring of a man called Henry.

variants.name: Fitzsimmons
meanings: Irish and English: variant of Fitzsimon, with post-medieval excrescent -s, from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + either of the personal names Simon or Sigmund (see Simon ), ‘son of Simon or Sigmund’. The name is also found in the Gaelicized form Mac Síomóin.

variants.name: Fitzgibbon
meanings: Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gibbon, a Norman French pet form of Gilbert ; ‘son of Gibbon’. This name has long been a widespread and important surname in Ireland, and Gaelicized as Mac Giobúin. Sir Gilbert (Gibbon) FitzJohn, illegitimate son of John FitzGerald, 1st Baron Desmond (died 1261), was the ancestor of a line of Anglo-Norman aristocracy in Ireland, who acquired the surname Fitzgibbon with reference to him. Gilbert and his Fitzgibbon descendants were known as ‘the White Knights’ on account of their fair complexion.

variants.name: Fitzharris
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aileen.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Harry ‘son of Harry’. MacLysaght describes this as the name of a distinguished County Wexford family, also known as Fitzhenry .

variants.name: Fitzmaurice
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aidan, Ciaran, Colm.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Maurice (see Morris 1), ‘son of Maurice’. This surname is common in Ireland, where it has also been Gaelicized as Mac Muiris. The Irish family of Fitzmaurice share a common Norman ancestry with the Fitzgerald family. They can be traced to Thomas Fitzmaurice, whose brother Gerald was the ancestor of the Irish Fitzgerald dynasty. Their father was Maurice Fitzgerald, a Norman baron (died 1176).

variants.name: Fitzhugh
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Hugh (see Hugh ), ‘son of Hugh’.

History: William Fitzhugh (1651–1701), from Bedford, England, emigrated to VA c. 1670 and established himself on the Potomac River in what was then Stafford County, VA, as a planter and exporter. He also practiced law, was a member of the Virginia House of Burgesses, and served in 1687 as lieutenant colonel of the county militia.

variants.name: Fitzroy
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
Altered form of English   Fitch  .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Alain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Breton form of Alan, now common in all parts of France. See Alan .

en.lifeSummary: Alain fitz Flaald Seneschal of Dol was born about 1024, in Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France as the son of Flaald fitz Hato First Steward of Dol. He married Tittensor ingen kenneth before 1046, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He registered for military service in 1070. He died in 1093, in his hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistan.

fr.lifeSummary: Alain fitz Flaald Seneschal of Dol est né environ 1024, à Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, fils de Flaald fitz Hato First Steward of Dol. Il a épousé Tittensor ingen kenneth avant 1046, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1070. Il est décédé en 1093, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistan.

de.lifeSummary: Alain fitz Flaald Seneschal of Dol wurde um 1024 in Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich, als Sohn von Flaald fitz Hato First Steward of Dol geboren. Er hat vor 1046 in Europa Tittensor ingen kenneth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er hat sich 1070 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1093 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistan begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Alain fitz Flaald Seneschal of Dol è nato il circa 1024 nel Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia come figlio di Flaald fitz Hato First Steward of Dol. Lui sposato Tittensor ingen kenneth prima del 1046, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1070. Morì nel 1093, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistan.

ja.lifeSummary: Alain fitz Flaald Seneschal of Dolは約1024年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインドル-デ-ブレタグンでFlaald fitz Hato First Steward of Dolの息子として生まれた。1046年以前にヨーロッパでTittensor ingen kennethと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1070年に兵役登録をした。彼は1093年に故郷で70歳で死去し，パキスタンآزاد جموں و کشمیرブリaルにて埋葬された。

ko.Burial Details Unknown: 파키스탄 آزاد جموں و کشمیر 버이a
ko.lifeSummary: Alain fitz Flaald Seneschal of Dol(은)는 대략 1024년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 도-데-브레타그니에서 Flaald fitz Hato First Steward of Dol의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1046년 이전 우럽에서 Tittensor ingen kenneth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1070년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1093년 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 파키스탄 آزاد جموں و کشمیر 버이a에 묻혔다.

mn.Burial Details Unknown: Buriāl, آزاد جموں و کشمیر, Пакистан

pt.lifeSummary: Alain fitz Flaald Seneschal of Dol nasceu aproximadamente 1024, em Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França filho de Flaald fitz Hato First Steward of Dol. Ele casou-se com Tittensor ingen kenneth antes 1046, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1070. Ele faleceu em 1093, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Paquistão.

ru.Burial Details Unknown: буриaл, آزاد جموں و کشمیر, Пакистан
ru.lifeSummary: Alain fitz Flaald Seneschal of Dol родился около 1024 г. в местности дол-де-бретагн, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция. Его отца звали Flaald fitz Hato First Steward of Dol. Он женился на женщине по имени Tittensor ingen kenneth перед 1046 г. в местности Европа. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. В 1070 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1093 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности буриaл, آزاد جموں و کشمیر, Пакистан.

sm.from 1070 to 1080: mai le 1070 e o'o I le 1080

es.lifeSummary: Alain fitz Flaald Seneschal of Dol nació aproximadamente 1024, en Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia como hijo de Flaald fitz Hato First Steward of Dol. Se casó con Tittensor ingen kenneth antes de 1046, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1070. Murió en 1093, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistán.
